risks.description: Risk: Any artifact in FINAL-PR-12 claims production readiness without an external validation receipt. This would be an overclaim and violates the claim boundary.
risks.mitigation: All FINAL-PR-12 proof packets list production_readiness in not_proven. Boundary matrix row no_production_ready_claim_without_receipt enforces this. validate-all checks confirm.

risks.description: Risk: Any artifact claims security certification without an external audit receipt. No external security audit exists for this release.
risks.mitigation: All FINAL-PR-12 proof packets list security_certification in not_proven. Boundary matrix row no_security_certification_without_receipt enforces this. SECURITY.md is explicit: no security certification claimed.

risks.description: Risk: FINAL-PR-12 artifacts are mistakenly treated as release certification. FINAL-PR-12 prepares inputs only; FINAL-PR-13 performs release closure.
risks.mitigation: All FINAL-PR-12 artifacts carry final_pr_13_remains_deferred: true. release_certification is in not_proven for all FINAL-PR-12 outputs. Claim boundary wording is explicit: 'prepares_release_closure_not_certification'.

risks.description: Risk: Odin's routing or model role design is claimed to produce superior model output versus alternative approaches. No empirical benchmark receipt exists.
risks.mitigation: model_superiority is in not_proven for all relevant proof packets. Route plans are described as structural plans, not quality benchmarks. validate-small-model-route-plan confirms not_proven: real_model_benchmark.

risks.description: Risk: Model route plans or semantic kernel IR objects are cited as empirical model performance benchmarks. Route plans are structural only.
risks.mitigation: real_model_benchmark is in not_proven for all proof packets. Boundary matrix row small_model_route_not_quality_benchmark enforces this. All IR objects carry claim_boundary scoped to structural evidence.

risks.description: Risk: Local provider execution is treated as enabled by default, leading to unintended model inference during validation or normal use.
risks.mitigation: odin/operational_spine/provider_seam.py — disabled_by_default: true. validate-deferred-system-lift confirms provider seam off by default. Local provider receipts require explicit host configuration.

risks.description: Risk: Odin subsystem applies state to the host app without an explicit app-owned apply decision. This violates the candidate_only boundary.
risks.mitigation: candidate_only: true and app_owned_apply: true enforced in all spine outputs. Boundary matrix row app_owned_apply enforces this. validate-operational-spine confirms.

risks.description: Risk: Odin subsystem sends data to external services, APIs, or networks without an explicit scoped host receipt.
risks.mitigation: Boundary matrix row no_external_send enforces no external sends. All subsystems operate locally by default. validate-operational-spine confirms no_external_send.

risks.description: Risk: Odin accesses public network endpoints without explicit host receipt. This would violate local-first boundary.
risks.mitigation: Boundary matrix row local_only_default enforces local-first. QIRC is local-only by default (no_public_qirc_by_default). No public network calls in any FINAL-PR-12 modules.

risks.description: Risk: FINAL-PR-12 work is mistaken for FINAL-PR-13 release closure. FINAL-PR-13 must remain deferred until FINAL-PR-12 is accepted.
risks.mitigation: All FINAL-PR-12 artifacts carry final_pr_13_remains_deferred: true. final_pr_13_release_closure is in not_proven for all FINAL-PR-12 outputs. Input bundle explicitly states: does_not_implement_pr13: true, does_not_close_release: true.
